taxonomy: Nonatelia reticulata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a member of the genus Nonatelia, which is a group of plants primarily found in tropical regions. The family Apocynaceae comprises a wide range of plants, including milkweeds, periwinkles, and oleander. Nonatelia reticulata is likely to be native to the tropical regions of Asia, where many other species of the Apocynaceae family can be found. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and distribution of Nonatelia reticulata.
